name: provana-design
description: UI/UX, design system, and component styling skills for Provana engineering teams

ui-ux.description: Comprehensive UI/UX rules: accessibility, touch targets, typography, color, animation, forms, navigation, data visualization. Use when designing or reviewing any UI — dashboards, admin panels, data tables, forms, modals.

design-system.description: Provana design tokens, three-layer token architecture (primitive→semantic→component), CSS variables, spacing/typography scales, Tailwind theme configuration. Use when setting up or extending the design system.

ui-styling.description: shadcn/ui component patterns, Tailwind CSS conventions, Next.js App Router layout patterns, dark mode, responsive design. Use when building or reviewing UI components in Next.js projects.
